lifelines.description: Ordered list of lifelines (left to right). At least 2 required. Use id to reference in messages.

id.description: Unique id; must match fromLifeline/toLifeline in messages.

isDestroyed.description: True to show destroy (X). At least one lifeline must have isDestroyed: true.

messages.description: Messages in strict top-to-bottom order. One message = one row. EVERY call A→B MUST have a return B→A (isReturn: true). NEVER use self-returns (B→B isReturn)—they are invalid. Keep diagram simple (3-5 lifelines).

isReturn.description: True for return/dashed messages. Only valid for cross-lifeline returns (B→A). NEVER set isReturn on self-messages.

opensNewActivation.description: True ONLY for self-messages (creates nested activation box). Max 1 per lifeline, max 2 total.

steps.description: Optional step-by-step sections. Each step has a title and the message indices (0-based) that belong to it.

title.description: Short step title (e.g. Request reports, Security check).

messageIndices.description: Zero-based indices of messages in this step.

fragments.description: Combined fragments (alt, opt, loop). Use at least one if code has conditionals/loops. Do NOT start at index 0.

messageIndices.description: Zero-based indices. Must not include 0 (no fragment first).
